case_title: ELEANOR ROWLAND VS. PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROWLAND, ELEANOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD. $2,004.65 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,089.65, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND HER HUSBAND AND IS INDEPENDENT OF ANY CREDIT OR CONCESSION ISSUED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY THE DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-14-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROWLAND, ELEANOR AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROWLAND, ELEANOR AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
